name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state, turn

Init == /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ state[turn] = "idle"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![turn] = "critical"]
          /\ turn' = turn
        \/ /\ state[turn] # "idle"
          /\ state' = state
          /\ turn' = turn + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
          /\ turn \in 1..N

====

name: Two-Phase Commit
Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

\* State of each philosopher: "thinking", "hungry", or "eating"
VARIABLES philosophers, forks

Init == /\ philosophers = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]
        /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> TRUE]  \* TRUE means fork i is free

\* Helper to get left and right fork indices for philosopher i
leftFork(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
rightFork(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

\* Action: philosopher i becomes hungry
Hungry(i) == /\ philosophers[i] = "thinking"
            /\ philosophers' = [philosophers EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
            /\ UNCHANGED forks

\* Action: philosopher i picks up forks if both are free
PickUp(i) == /\ philosophers[i] = "hungry"
            /\ forks[leftFork(i)] = TRUE
            /\ forks[rightFork(i)] = TRUE
            /\ philosophers' = [philosophers EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
            /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![leftFork(i)] = FALSE,
                                   ![rightFork(i)] = FALSE]
            /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

\* Action: philosopher i puts down forks
PutDown(i) == /\ philosophers[i] = "eating"
             /\ philosophers' = [philosophers EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
             /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![leftFork(i)] = TRUE,
                                ![rightFork(i)] = TRUE]
             /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

\* Next-state relation: any philosopher can become hungry, pick up forks, or put them down
Next == \E i \in 1..N:
          (Hungry(i) \/ PickUp(i) \/ PutDown(i))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<philosophers, forks>>

\* Type correctness invariant
TypeOK == /\ philosophers \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]
          /\ forks \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

\* Safety property: no two adjacent philosophers eat simultaneously
NoDeadlock == \A i \in 1..N:
                 philosophers[i] # "eating" \/ philosophers[rightFork(i)] # "eating"

\* Liveness property: every hungry philosopher eventually eats
\* (fairness condition)
SpecFair == Init /\ [][Next]_<<philosophers, forks>> /\ WF_vars[Hungry(i) => PickUp(i)]_<<philosophers, forks>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N
VARIABLES flag, num


vars == <<num, flag>>

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(num)]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
          /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => flag[j] = FALSE
          /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => num[j] = 0

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

vars == <<q, head, tail, size>>

Init == /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]  \* Queue initialized with zeros
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0

ProducerAction == /\ size < K
                 /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = 1]  \* Produce by setting 1
                 /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
                 /\ size' = size + 1
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<head, q>>

ConsumerAction == /\ size > 0
                 /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 0]  \* Consume by setting 0
                 /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
                 /\ size' = size - 1
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<tail, q>>

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ head \in 1..K
          /\ tail \in 1..K
          /\ size \in 0..K
          /\ q \in [1..K -> {0,1}]

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, majority, NULL

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = [i \in 1..N |-> NULL]
        /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "Follower"]

Next == 
    \E i \in 1..N :
        \/ /\ state[i] = "Follower"
           /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
           /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![i] = i]
           /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "Candidate"]
        \/ /\ state[i] = "Candidate"
           /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
           /\ votedFor' = votedFor
           /\ state' = state
        \/ /\ state[i] = "Leader"
           /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
           /\ votedFor' = votedFor
           /\ state' = state

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in Nat
          /\ votedFor \in [1..N -> 1..N \cup {NULL}]
          /\ state \in [1..N -> {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}]

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active, reader, writer

Init == 
  /\ readers = <<>> 
  /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == 
  /\ \E r \in 1..Len(readers) :
        /\ reader = readers[r]
        /\ reader \in 1..N
        /\ reader \notin readers
        /\ reader' = reader
        /\ writer_active' = writer_active
        /\ readers' = Append(readers, reader)
  \/ \E r \in 1..Len(readers) :
        /\ reader = readers[r]
        /\ reader \in 1..N
        /\ reader \in readers
        /\ reader' = reader
        /\ writer_active' = writer_active
        /\ readers' = Remove(readers, r)
  \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
     /\ \E w \in 1..N :
          /\ writer = w
          /\ writer \notin readers
          /\ writer' = writer
          /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          /\ readers' = readers
  \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
     /\ writer = writer
     /\ writer' = writer
     /\ writer_active' = FALSE
     /\ readers' = readers

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
VARIABLES tokenPos


vars == <<tokenPos>>

Init == tokenPos = 1

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ tokenPos' = IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL
VARIABLES store


vars == << store >>

Init == 
  /\ store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == 
  \/ /\ op = "Put"
     /\ k \in Keys
     /\ v \in Values
     /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
  \/ /\ op = "Get"
     /\ k \in Keys
     /\ store' = store

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M, V

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosen

vars == <<acceptors, proposers, chosen>>

Init == 
  /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [promised \in 1..N -> 0, accepted \in 1..N -> 0, value \in 1..N -> 0]]
  /\ proposers = [j \in 1..M |-> [ballot \in 1..N -> 0, value \in 1..N -> 0]]
  /\ chosen = 0

Prepare(p, a) == 
  /\ acceptors[a].promised <= proposers[p].ballot
  /\ acceptors' = [acceptors EXCEPT ![a].promised = proposers[p].ballot]
  /\ proposers' = proposers
  /\ chosen' = chosen

Promise(p, a) == 
  /\ acceptors[a].promised = proposers[p].ballot
  /\ proposers' = [proposers EXCEPT ![p].value = 
        IF acceptors[a].accepted > 0 THEN acceptors[a].value ELSE proposers[p].value]
  /\ acceptors' = acceptors
  /\ chosen' = chosen

Accept(p, a) == 
  /\ acceptors[a].promised = proposers[p].ballot
  /\ acceptors' = [acceptors EXCEPT ![a].accepted = proposers[p].ballot, ![a].value = proposers[p].value]
  /\ proposers' = proposers
  /\ chosen' = chosen

Chosen(v) == 
  /\ chosen = 0
  /\ chosen' = v

Next == 
  \E p \in 1..M : \E a \in 1..N : 
    /\ proposers[p].ballot > 0
    /\ proposers[p].value > 0
    /\ Prepare(p, a)
  \/ \E p \in 1..M : \E a \in 1..N : 
    /\ proposers[p].ballot > 0
    /\ proposers[p].value > 0
    /\ Promise(p, a)
  \/ \E p \in 1..M : \E a \in 1..N : 
    /\ proposers[p].ballot > 0
    /\ proposers[p].value > 0
    /\ Accept(p, a)
  \/ \E v \in V: Chosen(v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == 
  /\ acceptors \in [1..N -> [promised \in 1..N -> Nat, accepted \in 1..N -> Nat, value \in 1..N -> Nat]]
  /\ proposers \in [1..M -> [ballot \in 1..N -> Nat, value \in 1..N -> Nat]]
  /\ chosen \in 1..N

====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileSender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE
VARIABLES ackedChunks, retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ file = Seq(1..FILE_SIZE) \* For simplicity, file bytes are 1..FILE_SIZE
    /\ chunks = [i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) |-> 

                        SubSeq(file, (i-1)*CHUNK_SIZE + 1, i*CHUNK_SIZE)

                        SubSeq(file, (i-1)*CHUNK_SIZE + 1, FILE_SIZE)]
    /\ sentChunks = {}
    /\ ackedChunks = {}
    /\ retransmitCount = [i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) |-> 0]

SendChunk(i) ==
    /\ i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ i \notin sentChunks
    /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks \cup {i}
    /\ retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, ackedChunks>>

AckChunk(i) ==
    /\ i \in sentChunks
    /\ i \notin ackedChunks
    /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks \cup {i}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount>>

RetransmitChunk(i) ==
    /\ i \in sentChunks
    /\ i \notin ackedChunks
    /\ retransmitCount[i] < MAX_RETRIES
    /\ retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![i] = retransmitCount[i] + 1]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sentChunks, ackedChunks>>

Next ==
    \/ \E i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) : SendChunk(i)
    \/ \E i \in sentChunks \setminus ackedChunks : AckChunk(i)
    \/ \E i \in sentChunks \setminus ackedChunks : RetransmitChunk(i)
    \/ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sentChunks, ackedChunks, retransmitCount>>

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sentChunks, ackedChunks, retransmitCount>>

TypeOK ==
    /\ file \in Seq(1..FILE_SIZE)
    /\ chunks \in [1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) -> Seq(1..CHUNK_SIZE)]
    /\ sentChunks \subseteq 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ ackedChunks \subseteq 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ retransmitCount \in [1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) -> Nat]

====
